name: mise-en-place (use -g support)
description: Installs the mise CLI and use -g support to install global tools.

global.description: `mise use -g [args]` to install global tools. For example, `deno ruby lazygit lazydocker cargo:cargo-binstall`.

activate.description: Select how to activate mise in the system. `none` means no activation, `path` means add to PATH, and `shims` means use shims to activate. Supports bash and zsh.
